subcodes.first_line: O God of the world and Goal of the nations! Thou beholdest my state and hearest my cries, my sighing, and the lamentations of my heart [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اله العالم و مقصود الامم تری حالی و تسمع ضجیجی و حنینی و زفرات قلبی بما
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @prayer for protection, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
